Therapeutics

Direct disease associations, biomarker-linked drugs, OSMF narrative-review natural agents, merged ranking, and clinical trial / literature evidence (top agents)

DrugTypePhaseEvidence ScoreTrials & literatureSourcesLinks
ACETAZOLAMIDE Small molecule Approved Strong 105
8 trials 7 Cochrane 7 Meta-analysis 21 Trial pubs 20 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT05986773 — Diuretic Strategies in Acute Heart Failure Patients at High Risk for Diuretic Resistance (TERMINATED) PHASE4
  • NCT00746954 — Buspirone as a Potential Treatment for Recurrent Central Apnea (TERMINATED) PHASE3
  • NCT06414759 — Efficacy and Safety of Combination Diuretic Therapy in Patients With Acute Decompensated Heart Failure and Volume Overload (RECRUITING) PHASE4
  • NCT06475105 — Combination Oral Acetazolamide and Intravenous Furosemide on Acute Decompensated Heart Failure Outcomes (RECRUITING) PHASE4
  • NCT00517426 — Effects of Acetazolamide and CO2 Inhalation on Exercise-induced Periodic Breathing in Heart Failure (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT04062760 — Safety and Efficacy of Early, seQUential Oral dIuretic Nephron blockAde In Acute Heart Failure (UNKNOWN) PHASE4
  • NCT05940220 — Efficacy of Oral Acetazolamide in Decongestion in Patients With Heart Failure (UNKNOWN) PHASE3
  • NCT07199088 — Comparative Efficacy and Safety of Acetazolamide Versus Metolazone as an Adjunct to Standard Therapy in Patients With Acute Decompensated Heart Failure (RECRUITING) NA

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Combinations of diuretics for acute heart failure: a systematic review with network meta-analysis and trial sequential analysis (Heart (British Cardiac Society), 2025)
  • Cochrane review Effectiveness of Acetazolamide in Patients With Heart Failure: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (Cureus, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Acetazolamide therapy in patients with acute heart failure: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Heart failure reviews, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Acetazolamide as an Adjunctive Diuretic Therapy for Patients with Acute Decompensated Heart Failure: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (American journal of cardiovascular drugs : drugs, devices, and other interventions, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Effect of Acetazolamide as Add-On Diuretic Therapy in Patients With Heart Failure: A Meta-Analysis (Cureus, 2023)
  • Meta-analysis Diuretic strategies in acute heart failure: a systematic review and network meta-analysis of randomized clinical trials (European heart journal. Cardiovascular pharmacotherapy, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Efficacy and Safety of Different Combinations of Add-on Diuretic Therapy in Acute Heart Failure: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials (The American journal of cardiology, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Use of Acetazolamide in People with Decompensated Heart Failure: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (Current cardiology reports, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Efficacy of ambulatory intravenous diuresis for chronic heart failure patients: Insights from the DEA-HF trial (ESC heart failure, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Serum Chloride and the Response to Acetazolamide in Patients With Acute Heart Failure and Volume Overload: A Post Hoc Analysis From the ADVOR Trial (Circulation. Heart failure, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication Diuresis Efficacy in Ambulatory Congested Heart Failure Patients: Intrapatient Comparison of 3 Diuretic Regimens (DEA-HF) (JACC. Heart failure, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication [Acetazolamide in acute heart failure] (Revue medicale suisse, 2023)

METOPROLOL Small molecule Approved Strong 105
8 trials 8 Cochrane 26 Meta-analysis 250 Trial pubs 196 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT01970501 — Genetically Targeted Therapy for the Prevention of Symptomatic Atrial Fibrillation in Patients With Heart Failure (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT01434134 — Prevention of Cardiac Dysfunction During Adjuvant Breast Cancer Therapy (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT04757584 — Pilot Deprescribing N-of-1 Trials for Beta-blockers in HFpEF (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT04962711 — Risk-guided Disease Management Plan to Prevent Heart Failure in Patients Treated With Previous Chemotherapy (REDEEM) (RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT00497003 — Effect of Beta Blocker Treatment on Endothelial Function in Patients With Type 2 Diabetes or Chronic Heart Failure (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00433043 — BOAT: Beta Blocker Uptitration With OptiVol After Cardiac Resynchronization Therapy (CRT) (TERMINATED) PHASE4
  • NCT07298993 — Deprescribing Beta-Blockers in Elders With Heart Failure With Preserved Ejection Fraction (DEPRESCRIBE-HFpEF) (ENROLLING_BY_INVITATION) PHASE4
  • NCT00802230 — Pharmacodynamic Study of Carvedilol Versus Metoprolol in Heart Failure (COMPLETED) PHASE4

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Role of cardioprotective agents on chemotherapy-induced heart failure: A systematic review and network meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Pharmacological research, 2020)
  • Cochrane review Meta-Analysis Comparing Metoprolol and Carvedilol on Mortality Benefits in Patients With Acute Myocardial Infarction (The American journal of cardiology, 2017)
  • Cochrane review Pediatric Cardiac Intensive Care Society 2014 Consensus Statement: Pharmacotherapies in Cardiac Critical Care Chronic Heart Failure (Pediatric critical care medicine : a journal of the Society of Critical Care Medicine and the World Federation of Pediatric Intensive and Critical Care Societies, 2016)
  • Cochrane review Beta-adrenergic blockers for perioperative cardiac risk reduction in people undergoing vascular surgery (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2015)
  • Cochrane review Antiarrhythmics for maintaining sinus rhythm after cardioversion of atrial fibrillation (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2015)
  • Meta-analysis Beta-blocker therapy in heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (B-HFpEF): A systematic review and meta-analysis (Current problems in cardiology, 2024)
  • Meta-analysis Beta-Blockers for Primary Prevention of Anthracycline-Induced Cardiac Toxicity: An Updated Meta-Analysis of Randomized Clinical Trials (Cardiovascular therapeutics, 2022)
  • Meta-analysis Management of atrial flutter and atrial fibrillation with rapid ventricular response in patients with acute decompensated heart failure: A systematic review (Academic emergency medicine : official journal of the Society for Academic Emergency Medicine, 2023)
  • Meta-analysis Model-based meta-analysis of changes in circulatory system physiology in patients with chronic heart failure (CPT: pharmacometrics & systems pharmacology, 2021)
  • Systematic review Clinical Pharmacogenetics Implementation Consortium Guideline (CPIC) for CYP2D6, ADRB1, ADRB2, ADRA2C, GRK4, and GRK5 Genotypes and Beta-Blocker Therapy (Clinical pharmacology and therapeutics, 2024)
  • Systematic review Influence of Weight and Body Size on the Pharmacokinetics of Heart Failure Pharmacotherapy: A Systematic Review (The Annals of pharmacotherapy, 2024)
  • Systematic review Extracorporeal treatment for poisoning to beta-adrenergic antagonists: systematic review and recommendations from the EXTRIP workgroup (Critical care (London, England), 2021)

ISOSORBIDE DINITRATE Small molecule Approved Strong 100
8 trials 7 Cochrane 3 Meta-analysis 103 Trial pubs 83 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT01270139 — Plasmonic Nanophotothermal Therapy of Atherosclerosis (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT02228408 — Safety and Cardiovascular Efficacy of Hydralazine and Isosorbide Dinitrate in Dialysis-Dependent ESRD (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT03255512 — Vericiguat Drug-drug Interaction Study With Isosorbite Mononitrate in Stable Coronary Artery Disease Patients (COMPLETED) PHASE1
  • NCT03514108 — DANHEART (H-HeFT and Met-HeFT) (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT02305095 — Genomic Response Analysis of Heart Failure Therapy in African Americans (COMPLETED)
  • NCT00047775 — African-American Heart Failure Trial (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT02627196 — Baroreflex Activation Therapy for Heart Failure (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT06400784 — Hypertensive Heart Failure Treatment in SSA (COMPLETED) PHASE4

Published literature

  • Cochrane review How do we define high and low dose intensity of heart failure medications: a scoping review (BMC cardiovascular disorders, 2023)
  • Cochrane review A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis of Pharmacological Treatment of Heart Failure With Reduced Ejection Fraction (JACC. Heart failure, 2022)
  • Cochrane review New pharmacological treatments for heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (HFrEF): A Bayesian network meta-analysis (Medicine, 2020)
  • Cochrane review Nitrates for the prevention of cardiac morbidity and mortality in patients undergoing non-cardiac surgery (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2016)
  • Cochrane review Nitrates for acute heart failure syndromes (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2013)
  • Systematic review Heart failure (BMJ clinical evidence, 2011)
  • Systematic review Heart failure (BMJ clinical evidence, 2010)
  • Clinical trial publication Combination Hydralazine and Isosorbide Dinitrate in Dialysis-Dependent ESRD (HIDE): A Randomized, Placebo-Controlled, Pilot Trial (Kidney360, 2020)
  • Clinical trial publication Prevention of contrast-induced nephropathy by adequate hydration combined with isosorbide dinitrate for patients with renal insufficiency and congestive heart failure (Clinical cardiology, 2019)
  • Clinical trial publication Heart Failure With Recovered Ejection Fraction in African Americans: Results From the African-American Heart Failure Trial (Journal of cardiac failure, 2018)
  • Clinical trial publication Isosorbide Dinitrate, With or Without Hydralazine, Does Not Reduce Wave Reflections, Left Ventricular Hypertrophy, or Myocardial Fibrosis in Patients With Heart Failure With Preserved Ejection Fraction (Journal of the American Heart Association, 2017)
  • Clinical trial publication Bi treatment with hydralazine/nitrates vs. placebo in Africans admitted with acute HEart Failure (BA-HEF) (European journal of heart failure, 2016)

CARVEDILOL Repurposing Small molecule Approved Strong 95

  • Meta-analysis Beta-blocker therapy in heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (B-HFpEF): A systematic review and meta-analysis (Current problems in cardiology, 2024)
  • Meta-analysis Beta-Blockers for Primary Prevention of Anthracycline-Induced Cardiac Toxicity: An Updated Meta-Analysis of Randomized Clinical Trials (Cardiovascular therapeutics, 2022)
  • Meta-analysis Efficacy of medication therapy for patients with chronic kidney disease and heart failure with preserved ejection fraction: a systematic review and meta-analysis (International urology and nephrology, 2022)
  • Clinical trial publication Impaired myocardial work in heart failure with improved ejection fraction: A post hoc analysis from the CATHEDRAL-HF trial (International journal of cardiology, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Contemporary Oral Medication Use and Frequency in Patients with Transthyretin Amyloid Cardiomyopathy (American journal of cardiovascular drugs : drugs, devices, and other interventions, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Effect of carvedilol versus placebo on cardiac function in anthracycline-exposed survivors of childhood cancer (PREVENT-HF): a randomised, controlled, phase 2b trial (The Lancet. Oncology, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication Ivabradine could not decrease mitral regurgitation triggered atrial fibrosis and fibrillation compared with carvedilol (ESC heart failure, 2024)

Registry trials

  • NCT04757584 — Pilot Deprescribing N-of-1 Trials for Beta-blockers in HFpEF (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT05585125 — A Preliminary Study for INFORMED (ENROLLING_BY_INVITATION) PHASE4
  • NCT04767061 — Impact of Beta-blockers on Physical Function in HFpEF (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT05019027 — N-of-1 for Beta-Blockers in Cardiac Amyloidosis (ENROLLING_BY_INVITATION) PHASE4

Published literature

  • Cochrane review How do we define high and low dose intensity of heart failure medications: a scoping review (BMC cardiovascular disorders, 2023)
  • Clinical trial publication Cardiovascular drugs in human mechanical nociception: digoxin, amlodipine, propranolol, pindolol and atenolol (Investigacion clinica, 2010)
  • Clinical trial publication Cardiovascular events in elderly patients with isolated systolic hypertension. A subgroup analysis of treatment strategies in STOP-Hypertension-2 (Blood pressure, 2004)
  • Clinical trial publication Effects of thyroxine on cardiac function and lymphocyte beta-adrenoceptors in patients with chronic congestive heart failure (Chinese medical journal, 2003)
  • Clinical trial publication Adverse reactions to pindolol administration (American heart journal, 1982)
  • Clinical trial publication The influence of beta-adrenoceptor blockade on left ventricular function (British journal of clinical pharmacology, 1982)

DrugTypePhaseEvidence ScoreTrials & literatureSourcesLinks
ACETAZOLAMIDE Small molecule Phase III Moderate 80
8 trials 7 Cochrane 7 Meta-analysis 21 Trial pubs 20 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT05986773 — Diuretic Strategies in Acute Heart Failure Patients at High Risk for Diuretic Resistance (TERMINATED) PHASE4
  • NCT00746954 — Buspirone as a Potential Treatment for Recurrent Central Apnea (TERMINATED) PHASE3
  • NCT06414759 — Efficacy and Safety of Combination Diuretic Therapy in Patients With Acute Decompensated Heart Failure and Volume Overload (RECRUITING) PHASE4
  • NCT06475105 — Combination Oral Acetazolamide and Intravenous Furosemide on Acute Decompensated Heart Failure Outcomes (RECRUITING) PHASE4
  • NCT00517426 — Effects of Acetazolamide and CO2 Inhalation on Exercise-induced Periodic Breathing in Heart Failure (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT04062760 — Safety and Efficacy of Early, seQUential Oral dIuretic Nephron blockAde In Acute Heart Failure (UNKNOWN) PHASE4
  • NCT05940220 — Efficacy of Oral Acetazolamide in Decongestion in Patients With Heart Failure (UNKNOWN) PHASE3
  • NCT07199088 — Comparative Efficacy and Safety of Acetazolamide Versus Metolazone as an Adjunct to Standard Therapy in Patients With Acute Decompensated Heart Failure (RECRUITING) NA

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Combinations of diuretics for acute heart failure: a systematic review with network meta-analysis and trial sequential analysis (Heart (British Cardiac Society), 2025)
  • Cochrane review Effectiveness of Acetazolamide in Patients With Heart Failure: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (Cureus, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Acetazolamide therapy in patients with acute heart failure: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Heart failure reviews, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Acetazolamide as an Adjunctive Diuretic Therapy for Patients with Acute Decompensated Heart Failure: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (American journal of cardiovascular drugs : drugs, devices, and other interventions, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Effect of Acetazolamide as Add-On Diuretic Therapy in Patients With Heart Failure: A Meta-Analysis (Cureus, 2023)
  • Meta-analysis Diuretic strategies in acute heart failure: a systematic review and network meta-analysis of randomized clinical trials (European heart journal. Cardiovascular pharmacotherapy, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Efficacy and Safety of Different Combinations of Add-on Diuretic Therapy in Acute Heart Failure: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials (The American journal of cardiology, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Use of Acetazolamide in People with Decompensated Heart Failure: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (Current cardiology reports, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Efficacy of ambulatory intravenous diuresis for chronic heart failure patients: Insights from the DEA-HF trial (ESC heart failure, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Serum Chloride and the Response to Acetazolamide in Patients With Acute Heart Failure and Volume Overload: A Post Hoc Analysis From the ADVOR Trial (Circulation. Heart failure, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication Diuresis Efficacy in Ambulatory Congested Heart Failure Patients: Intrapatient Comparison of 3 Diuretic Regimens (DEA-HF) (JACC. Heart failure, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication [Acetazolamide in acute heart failure] (Revue medicale suisse, 2023)

METOPROLOL Small molecule Phase III Moderate 80
8 trials 8 Cochrane 26 Meta-analysis 250 Trial pubs 196 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT01970501 — Genetically Targeted Therapy for the Prevention of Symptomatic Atrial Fibrillation in Patients With Heart Failure (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT01434134 — Prevention of Cardiac Dysfunction During Adjuvant Breast Cancer Therapy (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT04757584 — Pilot Deprescribing N-of-1 Trials for Beta-blockers in HFpEF (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT04962711 — Risk-guided Disease Management Plan to Prevent Heart Failure in Patients Treated With Previous Chemotherapy (REDEEM) (RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT00497003 — Effect of Beta Blocker Treatment on Endothelial Function in Patients With Type 2 Diabetes or Chronic Heart Failure (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00433043 — BOAT: Beta Blocker Uptitration With OptiVol After Cardiac Resynchronization Therapy (CRT) (TERMINATED) PHASE4
  • NCT07298993 — Deprescribing Beta-Blockers in Elders With Heart Failure With Preserved Ejection Fraction (DEPRESCRIBE-HFpEF) (ENROLLING_BY_INVITATION) PHASE4
  • NCT00802230 — Pharmacodynamic Study of Carvedilol Versus Metoprolol in Heart Failure (COMPLETED) PHASE4

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Role of cardioprotective agents on chemotherapy-induced heart failure: A systematic review and network meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Pharmacological research, 2020)
  • Cochrane review Meta-Analysis Comparing Metoprolol and Carvedilol on Mortality Benefits in Patients With Acute Myocardial Infarction (The American journal of cardiology, 2017)
  • Cochrane review Pediatric Cardiac Intensive Care Society 2014 Consensus Statement: Pharmacotherapies in Cardiac Critical Care Chronic Heart Failure (Pediatric critical care medicine : a journal of the Society of Critical Care Medicine and the World Federation of Pediatric Intensive and Critical Care Societies, 2016)
  • Cochrane review Beta-adrenergic blockers for perioperative cardiac risk reduction in people undergoing vascular surgery (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2015)
  • Cochrane review Antiarrhythmics for maintaining sinus rhythm after cardioversion of atrial fibrillation (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2015)
  • Meta-analysis Beta-blocker therapy in heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (B-HFpEF): A systematic review and meta-analysis (Current problems in cardiology, 2024)
  • Meta-analysis Beta-Blockers for Primary Prevention of Anthracycline-Induced Cardiac Toxicity: An Updated Meta-Analysis of Randomized Clinical Trials (Cardiovascular therapeutics, 2022)
  • Meta-analysis Management of atrial flutter and atrial fibrillation with rapid ventricular response in patients with acute decompensated heart failure: A systematic review (Academic emergency medicine : official journal of the Society for Academic Emergency Medicine, 2023)
  • Meta-analysis Model-based meta-analysis of changes in circulatory system physiology in patients with chronic heart failure (CPT: pharmacometrics & systems pharmacology, 2021)
  • Systematic review Clinical Pharmacogenetics Implementation Consortium Guideline (CPIC) for CYP2D6, ADRB1, ADRB2, ADRA2C, GRK4, and GRK5 Genotypes and Beta-Blocker Therapy (Clinical pharmacology and therapeutics, 2024)
  • Systematic review Influence of Weight and Body Size on the Pharmacokinetics of Heart Failure Pharmacotherapy: A Systematic Review (The Annals of pharmacotherapy, 2024)
  • Systematic review Extracorporeal treatment for poisoning to beta-adrenergic antagonists: systematic review and recommendations from the EXTRIP workgroup (Critical care (London, England), 2021)

Registry trials

  • NCT01270139 — Plasmonic Nanophotothermal Therapy of Atherosclerosis (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT02228408 — Safety and Cardiovascular Efficacy of Hydralazine and Isosorbide Dinitrate in Dialysis-Dependent ESRD (COMPLETED) PHASE4

  • NCT03514108 — DANHEART (H-HeFT and Met-HeFT) (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT02305095 — Genomic Response Analysis of Heart Failure Therapy in African Americans (COMPLETED)
  • NCT00047775 — African-American Heart Failure Trial (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT02627196 — Baroreflex Activation Therapy for Heart Failure (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT06400784 — Hypertensive Heart Failure Treatment in SSA (COMPLETED) PHASE4

Published literature

  • Cochrane review How do we define high and low dose intensity of heart failure medications: a scoping review (BMC cardiovascular disorders, 2023)
  • Cochrane review A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis of Pharmacological Treatment of Heart Failure With Reduced Ejection Fraction (JACC. Heart failure, 2022)
  • Cochrane review New pharmacological treatments for heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (HFrEF): A Bayesian network meta-analysis (Medicine, 2020)
  • Cochrane review Nitrates for the prevention of cardiac morbidity and mortality in patients undergoing non-cardiac surgery (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2016)
  • Cochrane review Nitrates for acute heart failure syndromes (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2013)
  • Systematic review Heart failure (BMJ clinical evidence, 2011)
  • Systematic review Heart failure (BMJ clinical evidence, 2010)
  • Clinical trial publication Combination Hydralazine and Isosorbide Dinitrate in Dialysis-Dependent ESRD (HIDE): A Randomized, Placebo-Controlled, Pilot Trial (Kidney360, 2020)
  • Clinical trial publication Prevention of contrast-induced nephropathy by adequate hydration combined with isosorbide dinitrate for patients with renal insufficiency and congestive heart failure (Clinical cardiology, 2019)
  • Clinical trial publication Heart Failure With Recovered Ejection Fraction in African Americans: Results From the African-American Heart Failure Trial (Journal of cardiac failure, 2018)
  • Clinical trial publication Isosorbide Dinitrate, With or Without Hydralazine, Does Not Reduce Wave Reflections, Left Ventricular Hypertrophy, or Myocardial Fibrosis in Patients With Heart Failure With Preserved Ejection Fraction (Journal of the American Heart Association, 2017)
  • Clinical trial publication Bi treatment with hydralazine/nitrates vs. placebo in Africans admitted with acute HEart Failure (BA-HEF) (European journal of heart failure, 2016)

Registry trials

  • NCT05986773 — Diuretic Strategies in Acute Heart Failure Patients at High Risk for Diuretic Resistance (TERMINATED) PHASE4

  • NCT06475105 — Combination Oral Acetazolamide and Intravenous Furosemide on Acute Decompensated Heart Failure Outcomes (RECRUITING) PHASE4
  • NCT00517426 — Effects of Acetazolamide and CO2 Inhalation on Exercise-induced Periodic Breathing in Heart Failure (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT04062760 — Safety and Efficacy of Early, seQUential Oral dIuretic Nephron blockAde In Acute Heart Failure (UNKNOWN) PHASE4
  • NCT05940220 — Efficacy of Oral Acetazolamide in Decongestion in Patients With Heart Failure (UNKNOWN) PHASE3

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Combinations of diuretics for acute heart failure: a systematic review with network meta-analysis and trial sequential analysis (Heart (British Cardiac Society), 2025)
  • Cochrane review Effectiveness of Acetazolamide in Patients With Heart Failure: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (Cureus, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Acetazolamide therapy in patients with acute heart failure: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Heart failure reviews, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Acetazolamide as an Adjunctive Diuretic Therapy for Patients with Acute Decompensated Heart Failure: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (American journal of cardiovascular drugs : drugs, devices, and other interventions, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Effect of Acetazolamide as Add-On Diuretic Therapy in Patients With Heart Failure: A Meta-Analysis (Cureus, 2023)
  • Meta-analysis Diuretic strategies in acute heart failure: a systematic review and network meta-analysis of randomized clinical trials (European heart journal. Cardiovascular pharmacotherapy, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Efficacy and Safety of Different Combinations of Add-on Diuretic Therapy in Acute Heart Failure: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials (The American journal of cardiology, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Use of Acetazolamide in People with Decompensated Heart Failure: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (Current cardiology reports, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Efficacy of ambulatory intravenous diuresis for chronic heart failure patients: Insights from the DEA-HF trial (ESC heart failure, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Serum Chloride and the Response to Acetazolamide in Patients With Acute Heart Failure and Volume Overload: A Post Hoc Analysis From the ADVOR Trial (Circulation. Heart failure, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication Diuresis Efficacy in Ambulatory Congested Heart Failure Patients: Intrapatient Comparison of 3 Diuretic Regimens (DEA-HF) (JACC. Heart failure, 2024)

CARVEDILOL Repurposing via ADRB3 Small molecule Approved Strong 95
8 trials 16 Cochrane 34 Meta-analysis 349 Trial pubs 247 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT00004854 — The Safety and Efficacy of Adjunct Carvedilol in Children With Moderate Heart Failure (COMPLETED) PHASE1
  • NCT00374465 — Therapy With Verapamil or Carvedilol in Chronic Heart Failure (UNKNOWN) PHASE4
  • NCT00924833 — Effects of Nebivolol Versus Carvedilol on Cardiopulmonary Function at High Altitude in Healthy Subjects. (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT01723371 — Beta Blockers for Treatment of Pulmonary Arterial Hypertension in Children (WITHDRAWN) PHASE1, PHASE2
  • NCT00249067 — Retrospective Evaluation of Carvedilol Versus Captopril in CHF Patients (TERMINATED)
  • NCT00402376 — Evaluation of Myocardial Improvement in Patients Supported by Ventricular Assist Device Under Optimal Pharmacological Therapy (TERMINATED) PHASE4
  • NCT01178528 — Heart Rate Reduction in Heart Failure (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT04757584 — Pilot Deprescribing N-of-1 Trials for Beta-blockers in HFpEF (COMPLETED) PHASE4

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Pharmacological and interventional strategies for chronic Chagas cardiomyopathy: a systematic review of clinical outcomes (Revista clinica espanola, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Is Carvedilol Effective in Preventing and Modulating Concentric Cardiac Remodelling? A Comprehensive Systematic Review and Meta-Analyses (Cardiovascular therapeutics, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Minimization or withdrawal of oral pharmacotherapy in chronic heart failure patients with improved myocardial function: A systematic review (European journal of heart failure, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Predictors of cardiac disease in duchenne muscular dystrophy: a systematic review and evidence grading (Orphanet journal of rare diseases, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Comparative Efficacy of Different Drugs for the Treatment of Dilated Cardiomyopathy: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-analysis (Drugs in R&D, 2023)
  • Meta-analysis Beta-blocker therapy in heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (B-HFpEF): A systematic review and meta-analysis (Current problems in cardiology, 2024)
  • Meta-analysis Beta-Blockers for Primary Prevention of Anthracycline-Induced Cardiac Toxicity: An Updated Meta-Analysis of Randomized Clinical Trials (Cardiovascular therapeutics, 2022)
  • Meta-analysis Efficacy of medication therapy for patients with chronic kidney disease and heart failure with preserved ejection fraction: a systematic review and meta-analysis (International urology and nephrology, 2022)
  • Clinical trial publication Impaired myocardial work in heart failure with improved ejection fraction: A post hoc analysis from the CATHEDRAL-HF trial (International journal of cardiology, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Contemporary Oral Medication Use and Frequency in Patients with Transthyretin Amyloid Cardiomyopathy (American journal of cardiovascular drugs : drugs, devices, and other interventions, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Effect of carvedilol versus placebo on cardiac function in anthracycline-exposed survivors of childhood cancer (PREVENT-HF): a randomised, controlled, phase 2b trial (The Lancet. Oncology, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication Ivabradine could not decrease mitral regurgitation triggered atrial fibrosis and fibrillation compared with carvedilol (ESC heart failure, 2024)

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Back to the flow: a comprehensive systematic review and meta-analysis of epinephrine in the treatment of no-reflow (Coronary artery disease, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Vasoplegic syndrome after cardiovascular surgery: A review of pathophysiology and outcome-oriented therapeutic management (Journal of cardiac surgery, 2021)
  • Cochrane review Inotropic agents and vasodilator strategies for the treatment of cardiogenic shock or low cardiac output syndrome (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2020)
  • Cochrane review Inotropic agents and vasodilator strategies for the treatment of cardiogenic shock or low cardiac output syndrome (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2018)
  • Clinical trial publication Pharmacological Heart Failure Therapy in Children: Focus on Inotropic Support (Handbook of experimental pharmacology, 2020)
  • Clinical trial publication Effects of Cognitive Behavioral Therapy for Insomnia on Sleep, Symptoms, Stress, and Autonomic Function Among Patients With Heart Failure (Behavioral sleep medicine, 2020)
  • Clinical trial publication Management of cardiogenic shock in acute decompensated chronic heart failure: The ALTSHOCK phase II clinical trial (American heart journal, 2018)
  • Clinical trial publication B-type natriuretic peptide increases cortisol and catecholamine concentrations in healthy subjects (Journal of applied physiology (Bethesda, Md. : 1985), 2017)
  • Clinical trial publication Exercise training effects on elderly and middle-age patients with chronic heart failure after acute decompensation: A randomized, controlled trial (International journal of cardiology, 2016)
  • Randomized controlled trial Post hoc analysis of the glutamics-trial: intravenous glutamate infusion and use of inotropic drugs after cabg (BMC anesthesiology, 2016)
  • Randomized controlled trial Correlates of Exercise Self-efficacy in a Randomized Trial of Mind-Body Exercise in Patients With Chronic Heart Failure (Journal of cardiopulmonary rehabilitation and prevention, 2016)

  • NCT00497003 — Effect of Beta Blocker Treatment on Endothelial Function in Patients With Type 2 Diabetes or Chronic Heart Failure (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00433043 — BOAT: Beta Blocker Uptitration With OptiVol After Cardiac Resynchronization Therapy (CRT) (TERMINATED) PHASE4
  • NCT07298993 — Deprescribing Beta-Blockers in Elders With Heart Failure With Preserved Ejection Fraction (DEPRESCRIBE-HFpEF) (ENROLLING_BY_INVITATION) PHASE4

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Role of cardioprotective agents on chemotherapy-induced heart failure: A systematic review and network meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Pharmacological research, 2020)
  • Cochrane review Meta-Analysis Comparing Metoprolol and Carvedilol on Mortality Benefits in Patients With Acute Myocardial Infarction (The American journal of cardiology, 2017)
  • Cochrane review Pediatric Cardiac Intensive Care Society 2014 Consensus Statement: Pharmacotherapies in Cardiac Critical Care Chronic Heart Failure (Pediatric critical care medicine : a journal of the Society of Critical Care Medicine and the World Federation of Pediatric Intensive and Critical Care Societies, 2016)
  • Cochrane review Beta-adrenergic blockers for perioperative cardiac risk reduction in people undergoing vascular surgery (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2015)
  • Cochrane review Antiarrhythmics for maintaining sinus rhythm after cardioversion of atrial fibrillation (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2015)
  • Meta-analysis Beta-blocker therapy in heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (B-HFpEF): A systematic review and meta-analysis (Current problems in cardiology, 2024)
  • Meta-analysis Beta-Blockers for Primary Prevention of Anthracycline-Induced Cardiac Toxicity: An Updated Meta-Analysis of Randomized Clinical Trials (Cardiovascular therapeutics, 2022)
  • Meta-analysis Management of atrial flutter and atrial fibrillation with rapid ventricular response in patients with acute decompensated heart failure: A systematic review (Academic emergency medicine : official journal of the Society for Academic Emergency Medicine, 2023)
  • Meta-analysis Model-based meta-analysis of changes in circulatory system physiology in patients with chronic heart failure (CPT: pharmacometrics & systems pharmacology, 2021)
  • Systematic review Clinical Pharmacogenetics Implementation Consortium Guideline (CPIC) for CYP2D6, ADRB1, ADRB2, ADRA2C, GRK4, and GRK5 Genotypes and Beta-Blocker Therapy (Clinical pharmacology and therapeutics, 2024)
  • Systematic review Influence of Weight and Body Size on the Pharmacokinetics of Heart Failure Pharmacotherapy: A Systematic Review (The Annals of pharmacotherapy, 2024)
  • Systematic review Extracorporeal treatment for poisoning to beta-adrenergic antagonists: systematic review and recommendations from the EXTRIP workgroup (Critical care (London, England), 2021)

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Inotropic agents and vasodilator strategies for the treatment of cardiogenic shock or low cardiac output syndrome (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2018)
  • Cochrane review The Role of Omega-3 Polyunsaturated Fatty Acids in Heart Failure: A Meta-Analysis of Randomised Controlled Trials (Nutrients, 2016)
  • Cochrane review Antidepressants and cardiovascular adverse events: A narrative review (ARYA atherosclerosis, 2015)
  • Meta-analysis Effects of Renal Denervation on Cardiac Remodeling, Cardiac Function, and Cardiovascular Neurohormones in Heart Failure with Reduced Ejection Fraction Patients: A Meta-Analysis and Systematic Review (Cardiorenal medicine, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Sympathetic neural overdrive in congestive heart failure and its correlates: systematic reviews and meta-analysis (Journal of hypertension, 2019)
  • Clinical trial publication Effects of dapagliflozin on urinary output, fluid balance, and biochemistry in critically ill patients: a post-hoc secondary analysis of the DEFENDER trial (Critical care (London, England), 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Anaemia predicts iron homoeostasis dysregulation and modulates the response to empagliflozin in heart failure with reduced ejection fraction: the EMPATROPISM-FE trial (European heart journal, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication DPP4 (Dipeptidyl Peptidase-4) Inhibition Increases Catecholamines Without Increasing Blood Pressure During Sustained ACE (Angiotensin-Converting Enzyme) Inhibitor Treatment (Hypertension (Dallas, Tex. : 1979), 2022)
  • Clinical trial publication Empagliflozin in Heart Failure: Diuretic and Cardiorenal Effects (Circulation, 2020)
  • Clinical trial publication Pharmacological Heart Failure Therapy in Children: Focus on Inotropic Support (Handbook of experimental pharmacology, 2020)

  • NCT02996721 — A Trial Evaluating Vitamin D Normalization on Major Adverse Cardiovascular-Related Events Among Myocardial Infarction Patients (COMPLETED) PHASE4

  • NCT01005303 — Micronutrient Supplementation in Patients With Heart Failure (COMPLETED) PHASE2, PHASE3
  • NCT02271230 — Intervention With Vitamin D and Omega-3 Supplements and Incident Heart Failure (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00379899 — ADVANCE: Study to Evaluate Cinacalcet Plus Low Dose Vitamin D on Vascular Calcification in Subjects With Chronic Kidney Disease Receiving Hemodialysis (COMPLETED) PHASE4

Published literature

  • Systematic review Comparative Efficacy of Nutraceuticals on Endothelial Function: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis (Current atherosclerosis reports, 2026)
  • Randomized controlled trial Effect of vitamin D on endothelial and ventricular function in chronic heart failure patients: A prospective, randomized, placebo-controlled trial (Medicine, 2022)
  • Randomized controlled trial Daily Supplementation with 4000 IU Vitamin D3 for Three Years Does Not Modify Cardiovascular Risk Markers in Patients with Advanced Heart Failure: The Effect of Vitamin D on Mortality in Heart Failure Trial (Annals of nutrition & metabolism, 2019)
  • Randomized controlled trial Vitamin D(3) repletion versus placebo as adjunctive treatment of heart failure patient quality of life and hormonal indices: a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial (BMC cardiovascular disorders, 2017)

Alterations and therapeutics are aggregated from public databases (Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, DGIdb, and others). Natural agents are candidates from OSMF narrative reviews on opensourcemed.info/chronic-disease.html — not approved treatments. This page is for research orientation only — not medical advice.
